name: upgrade-copilot
description: A Codex plugin for planning and executing framework, dependency, and codebase upgrades.

interface.shortDescription: Plan and execute high-value codebase upgrades.
interface.longDescription: Upgrade Copilot helps engineering teams assess, plan, and implement framework and dependency upgrades in reviewable batches, with risk analysis, test strategy, and migration checklists.
defaultPrompt: Use Upgrade Copilot to assess this repository for a dependency upgrade.
Use Upgrade Copilot to plan a safe Next.js migration.
Use Upgrade Copilot to split this framework upgrade into reviewable PRs.
